ogTitle: Oakhampton Heights vs Oaklands: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Oakhampton Heights and Oaklands.
heading: Oakhampton Heights vs Oaklands — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Oakhampton Heights, New South Wales and Oaklands, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Oaklands has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Oakhampton Heights (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Oakhampton Heights or Oaklands safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Oakhampton Heights has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Oaklands scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Oakhampton Heights scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Oaklands scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Oakhampton Heights or Oaklands?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Oaklands has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
